Capybara has become a cute clay animation.
Enjoy the life of a capybara living a leisurely life in the green grasslands.

(Source: BANDAI OFFICIAL)

title_synonyms: Fatal Fury: CotW Special Music Video
Garou Densetsu: City of the Wolves
data.synopsis:
The music video features "Terry Andy Joe," a Ganacci-crafted remix of popular Fatal Fury music, set to the stunning animation of Masami Oobari (who himself served as creative producer, director, storyboarder, and key animation director). The City of the Wolves comes to life, moving to the beat of EDM, in this amazing artistic endeavor!

(Souce: Youtube)

Screened at the Glass no Chikyuu wo Sukue: Oyako Forum - Tezuka Osamu kara 21-seiki no Kimitachi e event at Himeji Welcome 21. In addition to the familiar characters from the original work, original characters Marine and the event's mascots Kirara and Mirara also make appearances.

(Source: Official site, translated)

titles.title: Okiraku Ryoushu no Tanoshii Ryouchi Bouei: Seisankei Majutsu de Na mo Naki Mura wo Saikyou no Jousai Toshi ni
Easygoing Territory Defense by the Optimistic Lord: Production Magic Turns a Nameless Village into the Strongest Fortified City
Fun Territory Defense by the Optimistic Lord
お気楽領主の楽しい領地防衛～生産系魔術で名もなき村を最強の城塞都市に～
Easygoing Territory Defense by the Optimistic Lord: Production Magic Turns a Nameless Village into the Strongest Fortified City

data.title: Okiraku Ryoushu no Tanoshii Ryouchi Bouei: Seisankei Majutsu de Na mo Naki Mura wo Saikyou no Jousai Toshi ni
data.title_english: Easygoing Territory Defense by the Optimistic Lord: Production Magic Turns a Nameless Village into the Strongest Fortified City
data.title_japanese: お気楽領主の楽しい領地防衛～生産系魔術で名もなき村を最強の城塞都市に～
title_synonyms: Easygoing Territory Defense by the Optimistic Lord: Production Magic Turns a Nameless Village into the Strongest Fortified City
Fun Territory Defense by the Optimistic Lord
data.synopsis:
Van, the fourth son of a powerful noble, is only two years old when he remembers his past life as a salaryman in Japan. With his adult brain in a young body, he's considered a child prodigy...until he displays the "Production Magic" skill when he turns eight. In a family that favors offensive magic, this crafting skill is considered useless in battle, and Van is banished to oversee a tiny country town in disgrace. With only his personal maid, the memories of his past life, and his "worthless" magic, can Van improve the fortunes of this little village—and himself?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
data.background: Each episode was streamed three days in advance of the TV broadcast starting on January 7, 2026, on Prime Video and Crunchyroll. Regular broadcasting began on January 10, 2026.

Holoearth Anime PV: "Now, Discover Your Other World"

data.title: Holoearth Anime PV: "Saa, Anata no Mou Hitotsu no Sekai e"
data.title_english: Holoearth Anime PV: "Now, Discover Your Other World"
data.title_japanese: 【#ホロアース】アニメPV「さあ、あなたのもうひとつのセカイへ」
data.synopsis:
Have you ever wanted to visit a place that's a world apart? This is the teaser PV for the world envisioned by "Holoearth."

The Holoearth project aims to utilize virtual platform technology to offer new virtual opportunities to those from all cultures around the world, in the form of various content and experiences set in another realm - an isekai - known as "Holoearth."

(Source: YouTube)

titles.title: Love Between Fairy and Devil 2nd Season

data.title: Cang Lan Jue 2
title_synonyms: Love Between Fairy and Devil 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
Dongfang Qingcang falls into the trap of the Peacock Military Advisor upon his return to Cangyan Sea after the war. As they say, misfortune never comes singly: Meanwhile, the God of War Chidi frequently appears in Orchid's sleep cryptically. Midway through the journey of the enemies Dongfang and Orchid, the Three Realms of Shadows, which are detached from the Three Realms, come into everyone’s view, and a huge secret subsequently surfaces.

(Source: iQIYI)

data.title: Ze Tian Ji (2026)
data.synopsis:
In a fictional world where humans, demons and monsters coexist, Chen Changsheng comes to the capital of gods with a marriage certificate in order to change his fate. Together with a group of young heroes, he waged a desperate battle against the forces of darkness. At the same time, he also harvested love and started his journey of rising as a powerful man in the capital of gods.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Mao Ni's (猫腻) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Wan Xiang Zhi Wang
data.synopsis:
Luolan Mansion, one of the five major mansions of Daxia in Shenzhou Continent, has fallen into decline due to the mysterious disappearance of two mansion masters. Although the young mansion master Li Luo is extremely talented and was born with three phase palaces, he has difficulty practicing because of his natural empty phase. 

Jiang Qinge, with whom he had been engaged since childhood, has a ninth-grade light phase and is extremely talented. Realizing the gap between them, Li Luo wanted to cancel the contract and break off the engagement, but was rejected by Jiang Qinge. 

On his seventeenth birthday, Li Luo took away the secret treasure left by his parents and obtained the water light phase, but the price was that his hair turned white overnight and his life was overdrawn. If he wanted to extend his life, he had to reach the state of a marquis within five years.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Tian Can Tudou's (天蚕土豆) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Shenguo Zhi Shang
data.synopsis:
Six days and nights, a strange case, and the boy returning to twelve years ago, can he break the shackles of the Kingdom of God this time?

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Jian Yi Si Jian's (见异思剑) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Aoshi Dan Shen
data.synopsis:
Born with a disability, and taking a desperate gamble, Shen Xiang ventures into perilous lands to find medicine to open his spiritual meridians. He unexpectedly saves two injured goddesses, one divine and one demonic, awakening his own divine meridians. Protecting his father and family, he becomes a legendary alchemist!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Ji Xiao Zei's (寂小贼) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Mo Tian Ji
data.synopsis:
What will happen when a desperate boy who grew up among evil people steps into the world of cultivating immortals? Immortals and demons can be separated by a thought, and life and death are not decided by heaven. Let's see how he goes against the current in this world where humans and demons coexist and evil spirits run rampant, and become a legend.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Jiu Yang Wushen
data.synopsis:
In his previous life, Ye Yunfei was gifted, but his martial veins suddenly closed and he could not practice martial arts. He was ridiculed by his family, betrayed by his fiancee, and encircled by various families. The young Ye Yunfei was deserted by his friends, bullied, sadly left by his beloved, and his father died tragically in battle. 

Fortunately, the Purple Saint True Lord who passed by Yunyou took him in as his disciple. Ye Yuntian grew up to be the youngest emperor in history, but was attacked when he was crossing the calamity. He was reborn when all the martial veins were lost, but it was also a passionate youth. Meeting his old relatives, friends, and lovers again, facing everything familiar, Ye Yunfei, a generation of emperor, chose to start over. 

There is still a trace of the soul of the emperor in his body, so that the memory of the previous life can be preserved intact. There is a dispute over fame and status inside, and the responsibility of honor and disgrace of the family veins outside. The imperial pride gathers, the four major sects are each for their own strength, and the heroes of Tianxuan Continent rise together. 

Ye Yunfei is familiar with the rules that the strong are respected in this world. With the help of the thousand-year memory of the Emperor of Heaven, Ye Yunfei's martial arts progressed amazingly, and he continued to grow in the martial arts world, and led his family and master to grow rapidly. Not long after the stabilization, foreign invaders came and invaded. Ye Yunfei led the people to resist and defend their homeland forever. 

In order to pursue a higher level of martial arts, Ye Yunfei left his hometown and embarked on a new journey, and finally became a generation of Emperor of Heaven. Having experienced too many insults and harassment, this life must be a life of killing gods and Buddhas, and riding a horse with a sword, living up to the youth.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Chao Neng Fuke Jing
data.synopsis:
Gods descended, disasters were rampant! When the gods invaded the earth, the superpowers with the mysterious "leaf pattern" became the last sword and shield of mankind. While the two superpower academies in the East and the West, Gou Chen and Adam, were fighting hard, a Chinese boy quietly rose up. He had the ability to replicate superpowers, and with a mortal body, he held the power of the world and would eventually kill the gods. 

This is the carnival of the godslayers!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

data.title: Bei Xue
data.synopsis:
Luo Han, a young man from the desert, goes to the Central Plains once every three years just to give a medicine cup to his friend Yi Lian. During this year's cup-sending trip, in order to help Yi Lian out of trouble, Luo Han gets involved, which leads to a huge theft of stolen silver, involving gangsters and dignitaries from the court, stirring up the world's political situation.

(Source: iQIYI, Google translated)

data.title: Daydream Believer
data.synopsis: Music video directed by artist Yoshitomo Nara for the song Daydream Believer by punk band Shonen Knife.
data.background: Shonen Knife covered the song "Daydream Believer" which is composed by American songwriter John Stewart shortly before he left the Kingston Trio. Daydream Believer is included in their 1998 album called Happy Hour.

data.title: Muhou no Ai
data.synopsis:
A short film by Ryuya Suzuki.

Midnight. A construction site. A man with a cone head and a woman with pink hair meet in a powerful encounter. A provocative tale of love, right and wrong over a quarter of a century between two outcasts.
data.background: Won the Japanese Grand Prix for Short Films at the 9th New Chitose Airport International Animation Festival (2022).

data.title: Kao
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Kao by Ave Mujica.
